title: 2025 TCC Keynote Speaker: Taa’ąįį Ch’igiiontà’
summary: We are honored to welcome Taa’ąįį Ch’igiiontà’ as the keynote speaker for the 2025 Annual Convention and Full Board of Directors Meeting. A Neets’ąįį Gwich’in from Vashrąįį K’ǫǫ (Arctic Village), Alaska, Taa’ąįį is a dedicated advocate for Indigenous knowledge, languages, and rights, with a strong f...

title: February 2025 Monthly Manager’s Report
summary: February 11, 2025 SUMMARY Hello! Time has moved quickly since our last board meeting, and it’s hard to believe we are already well into February. This month is shaping up to be a busy time for HEA, with significant engagement at both the state and national levels. Over the past three weeks, I attended a Regulatory Commission of Alaska (RCA) meeting in support of John Sims, president of Enstar, participated in the Cooperative Finance Corporation’s (CFC) Strategic Planning Meeting in Georgia—where I narrowly avoided being stranded by a major winter storm—and took part in the Alaska Power Association’s (APA) Legislative Conference in Juneau. Below is a summary of HEA’s recent business activities and progress toward our strategic goals. A more detailed report will be provided during the board meeting. SAFETY Unfortunately, we did have an Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) recordable incident in January. The full safety report is included in this month’s Board packet. In a...
